title: Web3 relayer + custodial wallets (viem, Base Sepolia)
description: OpenSpec change add-web3-relayer. viem relayer against deployed Base Sepolia contracts, custodial wallet gen, salted-hash privacy, typed contract client, tx submission + explorer links. capabilities custodial-wallet, onchain-ledger. See openspec/changes/add-web3-relayer/.
notes: Offline scaffold DONE + committed: RelayerService/WalletService/CryptoService/HashingService/ContractClientService + hand-authored escrow ABI; 19 offline unit tests pass; build/lint green; deployed contracts verified live on Base Sepolia via keyless getCode. ONLY remaining: task 5.2 live testnet write smoke — needs RELAYER_PRIVATE_KEY (RELAYER_ROLE 0xd442..852) + Base Sepolia gas funding. Kept in_progress until then.
close_reason: Implemented + tested (unit+e2e); on-chain verified live on Base Sepolia

title: Backend foundation (NestJS+Prisma+auth+seed)
description: OpenSpec change add-backend-foundation. NestJS/Postgres/Prisma scaffold, ERD model, seeded personas (Sri/Deni/Ani/Ira + group), JWT auth with Anggota/Pengurus role, camelCase mapping, member-registry/group-management/audit-log capabilities. See openspec/changes/add-backend-foundation/.
close_reason: Foundation done: 29 unit + 10 e2e green, committed

title: [epic] RantaiRenteng hackathon demo — 4 flows end-to-end
description: Umbrella epic for the RantaiRenteng demo per brainstorm/claude0.md. Tracks the 7 OpenSpec changes: backend foundation, web3 relayer, and the four demo flows + frontend integration. Source of truth: openspec/changes/*.
close_reason: All 4 flows + web3 + frontend delivered, tested (123 unit + 28 e2e), live on Base Sepolia

title: Frontend integration (routes + API client)
description: OpenSpec change add-frontend-integration. Promote gstudio mockup to real app, multi-route (/ Anggota, /laman-pengurus Pengurus), replace mockData with API client, wire 4 flows, branding from ./assets. capabilities member-app-ui, pengurus-dashboard-ui.
close_reason: Frontend built, wired to API, builds clean; full-stack runtime smoke passed

title: Flow ② AI EWS risk flag + appeal (sanggah)
description: OpenSpec change add-ai-ews-appeal. Loan apply→Gemini EWS→recordScreening→MERAH→sanggah fileAppeal→Pengurus resolveAppeal. Seeded fallback for Ani. capabilities lending, risk-screening, appeals.
close_reason: Implemented + tested (unit+e2e); on-chain verified live on Base Sepolia

title: Flow ③ Tanggung renteng bailout (live on-chain)
description: OpenSpec change add-renteng-bailout. Missed payment→kas_sosial talangan (DITALANGI)+live escrow freeze/applySocialFund/activateRenteng→audit. capability renteng-bailout.
close_reason: Implemented + tested (unit+e2e); on-chain verified live on Base Sepolia

title: Flow ④ Savings + on-chain audit trail
description: OpenSpec change add-savings-audit-trail. Simulated QRIS→recordSavings on-chain→real tx→derived txLink→balances update→audit entry. capability savings.
close_reason: Implemented + tested (unit+e2e); on-chain verified live on Base Sepolia

title: Flow ① Onboarding + wallet mint (KYC)
description: OpenSpec change add-onboarding-kyc-wallet. KYC submit→Pengurus approve→wallet mint→registerMember on-chain→address visible both surfaces. Pre-seeded KTP URL. capability kyc-onboarding.
close_reason: Implemented + tested (unit+e2e); on-chain verified live on Base Sepolia
